wins.event: Data Center revenue $2.8B record, +115% YoY; nearly 50% of total revenue
MI300 quarterly revenue exceeded $1B for first time; Microsoft uses MI300X to power GPT-4 Turbo
2024 DC GPU guidance raised from $4B to $4.5B+ — third consecutive raise
Client segment revenue $1.5B, +49% YoY; Zen 5 / Ryzen AI 300 launching
Silo AI acquisition announced (Europe's largest private AI lab)

risks.event: Gaming segment revenue $648M, -59% YoY; semi-custom expected lower in H2
Embedded segment revenue $861M, -41% YoY; flat sequentially but only gradual recovery in H2
Victor Peng (President) retiring end of August

guidance.notes: Data Center GPU 2024 guidance raised again, now $4.5B+ from prior $4B (set last quarter). Strong H2 trajectory expected on DC + Client.

_notes: Third consecutive DC GPU guidance raise. Strong AI momentum offset by persistent Gaming/Embedded weakness. CEO confident; story remains bullish.
